Awakening...
100 / 100
DAYTIME

Crimson Awakening

Volume II: Cathedral of Ashes

"The church bells ring across Dusk Hollow, drowning in a perpetual downpour. Brother Aldric maintains a holy iron grip inside the cathedral. The night demands retribution, and the ancient hunger demands blood..."

The Noir Chronicles

WASD
Move the Vampire through the shadows
Shift
Hold to Run (Increases noise & blood drain)
J / Click
Slash Attack (Melee weapon combat)
K
Dodge Roll (Provides temporary invincibility)
E
Feed on fallen/stunned Cathedral Guards to restore Blood
F
Bat Form (Requires 25% Blood. Fly fast and undetected)
G
Mist Step (Requires 75% Blood. Teleport through walls)
Chapter I

Nocturne in Dusk Hollow

"The Cathedral of the Sacred Dawn has stood for centuries, cleansing the city of your breed. Tonight, the blood on the cobble belongs to them."

Current Objective

Infiltrate the Cathedral to the North
Assassinate Brother Aldric
Click anywhere to begin the hunt...

You Have Perished

"The holy guards have purged the night of your presence."

The Feast Begins

Chapter I Completed

"Brother Aldric lies slain on the stone floor of his Cathedral. Dusk Hollow falls quiet under your shadow, and the feast of the crimson night has finally begun."
